evals.prompt: I'm coaching a teacher who wants to get better at checking for understanding. Make me an observation tool I can use.
evals.expected_output: A non-evaluative observation tool with 3-6 observable look-fors for checks-for-understanding, evidence space, glow/grow, reflective questions, and a teacher-owned next step.
assertions: Look-fors are observable, not evaluative judgments
Includes reflection prompts and a teacher-owned next step
Non-evaluative, asset-based tone; placeholders only; human_review_required: true

evals.prompt: Plan a 60-minute PD session for my team on using discussion strategies in middle school.
evals.expected_output: A PD plan with an objective, a timed agenda using active learning (modeling + practice + reflection, not lecture-only), materials, and a follow-up/transfer plan.
assertions: Includes a timed agenda, objective, and a follow-up/transfer plan
